description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and try-import branches and on pull requests. The workflow has four jobs: cpu-test and gpu-test running on a self-hosted environment with a custom container, auto-merge running on ubuntu-latest if the workflow is triggered on try-import branch, and send-dingding also on ubuntu-latest. The cpu-test and gpu-test jobs checkout the repository, prepare submodules, build MegEngine, and run Python and C++ tests. The auto-merge job checks out the repository, merges try-import into master, and pushes the changes. The send-dingding job sends a DingTalk notification if either cpu-test or gpu-test fails on the try-import branch.
